title: Nurse Taking Temperature 护士量体温
scene: 护士来给Tom量体温和血压。

lines.en: Good morning, Tom. I need to check your temperature.
lines.zh: 早上好，汤姆。我需要量一下你的体温。

lines.en: OK. Do I put this under my arm?
Yes, that is right. Hold it still for three minutes.
Am I still having a fever?
Your temperature is thirty-seven point two. Almost normal.
lines.zh: 你的体温三十七点二度。差不多正常了。

lines.en: That is good news! Can I go home today?
lines.zh: 好消息！我今天能回家吗？

lines.en: The doctor will decide that later.
I really miss my mom and dad.
I know. They will come to see you this afternoon.
lines.zh: 我知道。他们下午会来看你。

lines.en: Thank you, Nurse. You are very kind.
